rationale: The US-Iran deal uncertainty and Israeli strikes on Beirut keep energy price volatility alive for Poland, while EU-Ukraine accession talks continue as background noise; no qualitative new shock this cycle.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt; Israel strikes Beirut
top_events.summary: Ongoing uncertainty over the Iran deal and fresh Israeli strikes on Beirut sustain oil/gas price volatility that indirectly affects Polish energy costs, but no resolution or escalation qualifies as a new shock.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: Formal EU-Ukraine accession talks advancing is a continuation of a known process; no qualitative leap for Poland's security or economy this cycle.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian oil tanker accused of funding Ukraine war
top_events.summary: A UK seizure of a Russian shadow-fleet tanker signals tightening enforcement of sanctions relevant to Poland's security posture, but has limited direct daily impact.
